user_query: Add a zucchini noodle pesto bowl dinner option for mother on day 4

fields.name: Zucchini Noodle Pesto Bowl
fields.short_description: A light, low-carb dinner of spiralized zucchini tossed in a fresh basil pesto with cherry tomatoes and a sprinkle of parmesan — optionally topped with grilled chicken or chickpeas for added protein.
fields.meal_suggestion: Spiralize 2 medium zucchinis into noodles and lightly sauté or toss raw to keep them crisp (heat 1–2 minutes). Make a quick pesto by blending 1 cup fresh basil, 2 tablespoons pine nuts (or walnuts), 1/4 cup grated parmesan, 1 small garlic clove, juice of half a lemon, and 3 tablespoons olive oil until smooth; season to taste. Toss the zucchini noodles with the pesto and halved cherry tomatoes. Serve immediately, topped with extra parmesan and freshly cracked pepper. To add protein, top with sliced grilled chicken breast, pan-seared salmon, or a cup of roasted chickpeas.
fields.nutrition_note: Low in carbohydrates and calories while high in vitamins A and C and fiber from zucchini and tomatoes. Olive oil and pine nuts provide heart-healthy fats; parmesan adds calcium. Adding lean protein (chicken, salmon, or chickpeas) creates a balanced, satisfying meal suitable for a lighter dinner option.

insertion_point.reasoning: Append as an additional dinner option (position -1) to complement the existing heavier dishes with a lighter, vegetable-forward, low-carb choice appropriate for Mother's Day 4 dinner.
